name: Spotify Playlist Creator
description: Search for songs and create Spotify playlists. Requires Spotify account authorization.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: search_tracks
tools.description: Search Spotify for songs by name, artist, or genre. Use when the user wants to find music.

returnType.description: List of matching tracks with name, artist, album, and preview URL

tools.name: create_playlist
tools.description: Create a Spotify playlist with selected tracks. Requires Spotify authorization.

trackIds.description: Comma-separated list of Spotify track IDs to add

tools.name: get_auth_status
tools.description: Check if the user has authorized their Spotify account.
